classes.name: billing.data.default_usage_plans.DefaultFeature
documentation:
Single Product, e.g. "invoices-created"
This is a stripe "PRICE" (part of a PRODUCT)

functions.name: billing.service.subscription_handler.create_subscription
documentation:
Creates a new Stripe subscription for a user or organization.

Args:
    owner: The user or organization subscribing.
    subscription_plan: The plan the owner is subscribing to.

Returns:
    A UserSubscription object representing the subscription.

functions.name: billing.service.subscription_handler.cancel_subscription
documentation:
Cancels an active Stripe subscription and updates the local subscription record.

Args:
    user_subscription: The subscription to cancel.

Returns:
    The updated UserSubscription object with the end_date set.

functions.name: billing.service.subscription_handler.handle_plan_change
documentation:
Updates the user's Stripe subscription to a new plan, with proration handled automatically.

Args:
    user_subscription: The current UserSubscription to update.
    new_plan: The new SubscriptionPlan to switch to.

Returns:
    The updated UserSubscription object with the new plan.

functions.name: core.templatetags.strfilters.day_to_number_sunday
documentation:
Converts a day of the week to a number with Sunday as the first day.

Args:
    day (str): The day of the week (e.g., "Sunday", "Monday").

Returns:
    int: The corresponding number with Sunday as 0 and Saturday as 6.

functions.name: core.service.base.breadcrumbs.get_item
documentation:
Create a breadcrumb item dictionary.
Parameters:
- name (str): The name of the breadcrumb item.
- url_name (str): The URL name used for generating the URL using Django's reverse function.
- icon (Optional[str]): The icon associated with the breadcrumb item (default is None).
Returns:
Dict[str, Any]: A dictionary representing the breadcrumb item.

functions.name: core.service.base.breadcrumbs.generate_breadcrumbs
documentation:
Generate a list of breadcrumb items based on the provided list of breadcrumb names.
Parameters:
- breadcrumb_list (str): Variable number of strings representing the names of the breadcrumbs.
Returns:
List[Dict[str, Any]]: A list of dictionaries representing the breadcrumb items.

Redirects user to the last visited URL stored in session.
If no previous URL is found, redirects to the fallback URL.

\:param fallback_url: URL to redirect to if no previous URL found
